strengths: ~15 years of polyglot full-stack engineering across web, mobile, embedded
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Track record of founding/leading projects (GISCollective) and teaching/community work
concerns: Title is Senior/Staff, not Principal/Director-level IC; no evidence of org-wide technical leadership at scale
Minimal demonstrated AI/ML depth — no shipped AI products, research, or platform-scale ML work
No cloud-platform strategy experience or advisory work with strategic customers/partners

key_factors.factor: AI expertise and shipped AI products
Breadth of engineering experience across stacks

response.justification: The role demands a Director-level IC with recognized AI expertise, cloud platform strategy fluency, and the ability to advise strategic customers — competencies the résumé does not substantiate. AI exposure is limited to recent MCP/agent tooling contributions at re:cinq with no shipped AI products, publications, or platform work. Cloud experience is application-level (AWS CDK at Optilyz) rather than strategic platform design. Seniority tops out at Staff, with no evidence of influencing roadmaps across orgs or advising external partners. Strong craftsmanship, polyglot breadth, and an open-source platform (GISCollective) are real positives but insufficient for a Principal AI Strategy role.
